{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Mountainroot Iron body
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] activated his [[Mountainroot Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
